parse-template.doc:name: Parse Template
parse-template.content: #[vars.emailBody]

ee:message.ee:set-payload:
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "status": "Success", "statusCode": 200, "message": "Amount deposited successfully done for the Account Number - " ++ vars.accountNumber as String, "data": { "transactionId": "TXN-" ++ (now() as String {format: "yyyyMMddHHmmss"}), "currency": "INR", "balance": vars.balance, 'type': 'Deposit', "timestamp": now() }
}
